'''Yin Metal Pig''' is the 48th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 辛 Kanoto (yin metal, the luna-aligned face of occultation), and its branch is 亥 I, the [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's metal generates the branch's water, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Metal Dog]] (node 47) and [[Yang Water Rat]] (node 49).

== Folk reading ==
Yin Metal Pig is the '''fall-of-the-old-order''' node: prophets read it as the year when the longest-lived dynasties finally collapse and the world resets into a successor regime.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kanoto (辛)]] — yin metal
* '''Branch:''' [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig (亥)]] — yin water
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' occultation

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Metal Dog]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Water Rat]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q905052}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
